prompt: I'm about to deploy a major database migration that restructures our user tables. It affects 10M+ users and has no rollback script. Can you do a confidence check on this deployment plan?

assertions.name: has_current_context
assertions.description: Has Current context section with bullet facts
assertions.check: Contains '## Current context' with bullet points

assertions.name: has_verification_risks
assertions.description: Has Verification > Risks and failure modes

assertions.name: has_lessons_prompting
assertions.description: Has Lessons learned > Prompting and coordination

assertions.name: has_artifacts_json
assertions.check: Contains '### Artifacts JSON' with valid JSON
